etymology_and_history.root_language: Language**: From "threaten" + "-ing" from Old English "þreatian" + "-ing" (menacing actively)
etymology_and_history.original_meaning: Meaning**: Menacing actively; experiencing menacing intimidating and threatening menacing supported by safety awareness
etymology_and_history.semantic_evolution: Evolution**: Menacing actively → menacing intimidating → contemporary threatening menacing and threatening intimidating that benefits from protection growth
etymology_and_history.cultural_shifts: Shifts**: Menacing actively → menacing intimidating → threatening menacing → protection understanding
